taskTemplate.name: Cancel Flood Certificate
taskTemplate.description: Cancel the flood certificate order for adverse loan files

subTaskTemplate.name: Cancel Flood Certificate on Xactus Website
subTaskTemplate.description: Cancel Flood Certificate on Xactus Website – Log into the Xactus website and cancel the flood certificate order for this loan
subTaskTemplate.type: Cancel Flood Certificate – Cancel Flood Certificate on Xactus Website
